instruction: There's a stray red horizontal strikethrough on the queue list icon. Remove it.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/queue-list.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M3.75 12h16.5m-16.5 3.75h16.5M3.75 19.5h16.5M5.625 4.5h12.75a1.875 1.875 0 0 1 0 3.75H5.625a1.875 1.875 0 0 1 0-3.75Z"/></g>
  <line id="overstrike" stroke="#e63946" stroke-width="2" x1="16" y1="64" x2="112" y2="64" />
  <line id="overstrike" stroke="#e63946" stroke-width="2" x1="16" y1="64" x2="112" y2="64" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/queue-list.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M3.75 12h16.5m-16.5 3.75h16.5M3.75 19.5h16.5M5.625 4.5h12.75a1.875 1.875 0 0 1 0 3.75H5.625a1.875 1.875 0 0 1 0-3.75Z"/></g>
</svg>
